description_long: This object is a Samsung-branded smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, black touchscreen display with a digital clock, date, and stylized 'J' graphic, as well as three physical navigation buttons below the screen. The back is matte gray with the 'SAMSUNG' logo centered, a single rear camera module, an LED flash, and a speaker grille. The sides are slim and metallic, with a visible button on the right edge. The device appears to be constructed primarily from plastic and glass, with metallic accents and internal electronic components. Its overall design is modern and minimalistic, typical of mid-range smartphones.
description: A modern Samsung smartphone with a large black touchscreen, matte gray back, and single rear camera. Features include physical navigation buttons and a slim, metallic-edged profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black touchscreen, digital clock, stylized 'J' graphic, and three physical navigation buttons below the display.
description_view_1: Right side profile view highlighting the slimness of the device and a single button on the edge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte gray finish, centered 'SAMSUNG' logo, single rear camera, LED flash, and speaker grille.
description_view_3: Left side profile view showing the slim edge with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'SAMSUNG' logo is visible in two locations: in white text at the top front bezel above the screen, and in a larger, embossed style centered on the back cover.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a digital clock reading '12:45', the date 'ven. 25 novembre', a stylized green and yellow 'J' graphic, and standard status icons for battery, signal, and notifications. Three navigation icons are visible below the display.
attribute_camera_placement: A single rear camera module is located near the top left corner on the back, accompanied by an LED flash to its left and a speaker grille to its right.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical navigation buttons are located below the front display. A single elongated button is visible on the right edge, likely serving as a power or volume button.
